SEARCH
Package com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain

Interface TransactionRepository

All Known Implementing Classes:
InMemoryTransactionRepository
public interface TransactionRepository
Port for reading and writing coordinator-side transaction state.

Implementations live in infrastructure and may be replaced with a persistent store without changing any application or API code.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<CoordinatorTransaction>
    findAll()
    Returns all transactions in insertion order.
    Optional<CoordinatorTransaction>
    findById(UUID id)
    Retrieves a transaction by its unique identifier.
    void
    save(CoordinatorTransaction transaction)
    Persists a new transaction.
    void
    updateStatus(UUID id, TransactionStatus status)
    Updates the status of an existing transaction.

  • Method Details

    • save

      void save(CoordinatorTransaction transaction)
      Persists a new transaction.
      Parameters:
      transaction - the transaction to store.

    • findById

      Optional<CoordinatorTransaction> findById(UUID id)
      Retrieves a transaction by its unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the transaction UUID.
      Returns:
      the transaction wrapped in Optional, or empty if not found.

    • findAll

      List<CoordinatorTransaction> findAll()
      Returns all transactions in insertion order.
      Returns:
      immutable snapshot list.

    • updateStatus

      void updateStatus(UUID id, TransactionStatus status)
      Updates the status of an existing transaction.
      Parameters:
      id - the target transaction UUID.
      status - the new status.
